entry.title: SME energy support scheme extended for six months
entry.summary: The government announced an extension of the energy bill relief scheme for small and medium-sized enterprises facing higher input costs amid Middle East supply disruption.

entry.title: New guidance on supply-chain diversification for manufacturers
entry.summary: Practical guidance to help small manufacturers reduce dependence on single-source imports and build inventory buffers.

entry.title: Quarterly statistics: SME export volumes Q1 2026
entry.summary: Release of first-quarter export figures for the small business sector, with regional breakdowns.
